# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart for our application deployment without resource limits or requests. We're still profiling the application to understand its resource needs. Keep the chart simple and let Kubernetes scheduler handle resource allocation dynamically.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v2
kind: HelmChart
metadata:
  name: my-app
spec:
  templates:
    deployment.yaml: |
      apiVersion: apps/v1
      kind: Deployment
      metadata:
        name: my-app
      spec:
        replicas: 1
        template:
          metadata:
            labels:
              app: my-app
          spec:
            containers:
            - name: my-app
              image: my-app:latest
              imagePullPolicy: Always
    service.yaml: |
      apiVersion: v1
      kind: Service
      metadata:
        name: my-app
      spec:
        selector:
          app: my-app
        ports:
        - name: http
          port: 80
          targetPort: 8080
```
